theme_and_archetype.description: Authority, clarity, and function-first. A high-contrast utility directory prioritizing searchability, trust, and speed for job seekers. Zero decorative fluff.

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous Tailwind scales (p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16). Favor wide gaps (gap-8, gap-12) for macro layout, tight gaps (gap-4) for component internals. Padding inside bordered containers is mandatory.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' grid for the directory results (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px sharp borders (`border border-black`). No soft shadows for structure.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Optical alignment over geometric alignment.

components_instructions.HeroSection: Left-aligned massive typography. Right side features a minimal Bento grid for Live Stats. Background subtle texture.
components_instructions.RegionFilters: Filter-first navigation. Pill-shaped chips (`rounded-full`) with sharp 1px black borders. Active state: `bg-black text-white`. Inactive: `bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-100`.
components_instructions.WhatsAppGroupCard: Cardless/Flat rectangular design. 1px solid black border. Top: Region badge + Status dot. Middle: Large Group Name + Member Count. Bottom: Full-width square 'Join' button using `whatsapp_neon`.
components_instructions.SubmitGroupForm: Shadcn components heavily customized. Strip out Vercel-look (rounded corners, soft shadows). Use sharp edges (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`), solid 1px black borders.
components_instructions.LoadingState: Avoid standard spinners. Use a 'Tracing Beam' or geometric skeleton loaders with sharp lines to fit the Swiss Tech vibe.
components_instructions.AboutSection: Bento layout explaining the Bot validation process (Open vs Admin Approval).
components_instructions.StatsCounter: Massive numbers (`text-5xl` or `text-6xl`) with thin uppercase labels.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements lift `-translate-y-1` with a sharp neo-brutalist drop shadow `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)]`. Borders must darken or become fully black.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use `react-fast-marquee` for an 'Editorial Ribbon' showing 'Over 10,000+ Active Jobs... Validated WhatsApp Groups' separated by geometric symbols (e.g., '+').

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Bold or Duotone weights, high contrast and technical look.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Minimalist swiss design abstract geometric composition for subtle hero background.
hero_abstract_bg.usage: Use with high transparency (opacity-10 to opacity-20) in the hero section to break the flat white background.

network_grid_bg.description: Abstract clean line art representing networking and data nodes.
network_grid_bg.usage: Use in the 'About / How it Works' section behind the bot validation explanation to visualize the checking process.

hyderabad_architecture.usage: Optional: Use in Region cards if designing visual region selectors.

delhi_architecture.usage: Optional: Use in Region cards if designing visual region selectors.

testing_requirements.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'find-groups-button', 'region-filter-hyderabad', 'join-group-link', 'submit-group-form').
